name: becoming-a-person-of-influence
description: John C. Maxwell and Jim Dornan's 'Becoming a Person of Influence: How to Positively Impact the Lives of Others' — a practical guide to building genuine influence through integrity, nurturing, faith in people, listening, and generosity.
useCase: Develop the five qualities of positive influence — integrity, nurturing, faith in people, listening, and generosity — to become a leader who genuinely impacts others.
knownRisks: Christian faith perspective woven throughout — may not resonate with all readers
Primarily focused on individual influence, not systemic or positional power
Some examples and references are from the 1990s business context
